Lumify
Table of Contents

Namespace lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses

Classes

ChatMessageResponse

A chat message returned to clients, with the sender's resolved display name (see GetMessagesOfRoom(string, CancellationToken)).

EventResponse

A calendar event returned to clients (see EventsController). The all-day flag is exposed as a bool (mapped from the entity's integer).

FolderResponse

A folder returned to clients (see FoldersController).

FriendshipResponse

A friendship/friend-request returned to clients. The requester fields are populated for incoming requests; the friend fields for outgoing requests (see FriendshipController).

LinkItemResponse

A link item module returned to clients (see NotesController).

NoteResponse

A note (metadata only) returned to clients; its modules are fetched separately (see NotesController).

RelatedUserResponse

A user that can be added to a workspace, returned by workspace member search (see SearchAvailableUsersForWorkspace(string, string, CancellationToken)), enriched with live presence status.

TextblockResponse

A text block module returned to clients (see NotesController). The collapsed flag is exposed as a bool (mapped from the entity's integer).

TodoEntryResponse

A todo entry returned to clients (see TodoListsController).

TodoListResponse

A todo list returned to clients (see TodoListsController).

UserAccountInfoResponse

Account information for a user (name, e-mail, username, timestamps), returned by the account-info endpoints (see UsersController).

UserPreviewResponse

A compact public preview of a user (used in lists and search), enriched with live presence status (see UsersController).

UserProfileResponse

The public profile of a user (display name, avatar, bio), returned by the profile endpoints (see UsersController).

WorkspaceMemberResponse

A workspace member with their user profile and role (see GetWorkspaceMembers(string, CancellationToken)).

WorkspaceResponse

A workspace returned to clients (see WorkspaceController).

Made with docfx
